title: dicliptera haenkeana
intro: Dicliptera haenkeana, also known as Haenke's dictyopteris or Haenke's touch-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Dicliptera haenkeana is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
